"He surprised all of us. I knew he was going to be good but nah, I didn't know he was going to be this good," said New England Patriots wide receiver Stefon Diggs. He had just watched his quarterback Drake Maye complete 19 of 21 passes for 256 yards and five touchdowns before leaving the game for an early rest with five minutes left in the third quarter of Sunday's 42-10 win over the New York Jets. Diggs himself had accounted for 101 of those yards including a touchdown and a stunning Randy Moss impression over Qwan'tez Stiggers at the sideline to haul in Maye's precision-perfect off-platform strike. Denmark to buy US patrol planes despite Greenland rift WASHINGTON - The United States said on Dec 29 it had approved a US$1.8 billion (S$2.31 billion) sale of patrol aircraft to Denmark, despite renewed tension after an envoy of President Donald Trump called again for seizing Greenland . The State Department said it approved a request from Denmark to buy the P-8A patrol and reconnaissance system from Boeing, which will include up to three aircraft. The sale will “support the foreign policy goals and national security objectives of the United States by improving the security of a NATO ally that is a force for political stability and economic progress in Europe,” the State Department said in a notification to Congress. One week earlier, the State Department approved a separate sale of nearly US$1 billion in air-to-air missiles to Denmark. The United States has long pushed NATO allies to pay more on defence, with Mr Trump seeking to reduce the US footprint in Europe despite Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. But Europeans have been shocked by Mr Trump’s tone on Greenland, which is an autonomous Danish territory. Mr Trump earlier this month appointed the governor of Louisiana state, Mr Jeff Landry, as a special envoy to Greenland. Mr Landry immediately vowed to work to make the Arctic island “a part of the US”, leading Denmark to summon the US ambassador . Mr Trump has refused to rule out seizing Greenland by force, insisting that the United States needs the resource-rich island for its own security. AFP

Venezuela is in a prolonged political crisis over leadership and state control. If a sudden disruption at the top occurs, a temporary national leader may be formally sworn in to manage the government. criteria:
  • This question resolves based on the first formal swearing-in announcement or official record from Venezuela’s National Assembly or other de facto national executive authority, corroborated by at least two major international news outlets.
  • The question resolves on the date a person is formally sworn in as interim president, or on 31 January 2026 if no such swearing-in occurs before then.
  • Provide the full personal name of the individual formally sworn in as interim president.
### 797906 What military body will President Rashad al-Alimi announce to integrate anti-Houthi forces into Yemen’s military by January 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2025-12-14. Yemen’s internationally recognised government is trying to unify multiple armed factions that oppose the Houthis. A new command structure may be announced as part of that effort. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: Official statements from Yemen’s internationally recognised presidency or state media, corroborated by major international reporting such as Reuters, AP, or Al Jazeera.
  • Resolution Date: This question resolves on the date, no later than 31 January 2026, when the new military body is publicly announced and named.
  • Accepted Answer Format: Provide the exact official English name of the newly announced body. The answer should be a short organizational name, not an acronym unless that is the only official form used in the announcement.
### 630728 Who will Denmark and Greenland request a meeting with by January 13, 2026, over the Greenland dispute? background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-04. The United States, Denmark, and Greenland are in a growing diplomatic dispute over Greenland. Senior officials in Denmark and Greenland are considering direct talks with Washington. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: This question resolves based on an official statement from the Danish government or Greenlandic authorities, or consistent reporting from major outlets such as Reuters, AP, or Al Jazeera identifying the U.S. official whose meeting is being requested.
  • Resolution Date: Resolve no later than 13 January 2026, once the requested U.S. counterpart is publicly named.
  • Accepted Answer Format: Provide the full name of the U.S. official exactly as publicly reported.
### 269293 Where will Danish and Greenlandic diplomats visit for talks with senior U.S. officials on Greenland by January 14, 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2025-12-30. Diplomats from Denmark and Greenland may soon hold talks in Washington with senior U.S. officials about Arctic policy. The meeting venue is expected to be a significant governmental site. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: Official U.S. government schedules or meeting readouts, corroborated by a major newswire such as Reuters or AP.
  • Resolution Date: This question resolves when the venue of the talks is publicly identified, no later than 14th January 2026.
  • Accepted Answer Format: Provide the venue name as a short location phrase in 1-3 words.
### 468637 What country will Bangladesh ask the ICC to move its 2026 Men’s T20 World Cup matches to by 7 January 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2025-12-19. The ICC Men’s T20 World Cup 2026 is scheduled for February 2026. National cricket boards can ask for venue changes if they have travel or security concerns. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: Official statements from the Bangladesh Cricket Board or the ICC, or consistent reporting from major cricket news outlets such as Reuters or ESPNcricinfo published on or before 7 January 2026.
  • Resolution Date: This question resolves on the first public report or official statement, no later than 7 January 2026, that clearly identifies the country Bangladesh requested as the alternative venue for its World Cup matches.
  • Accepted Answer Format: Provide the short official country name only.
### 165622 Who will Chelsea appoint as its next permanent head coach by January 31, 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2025-12-25. Chelsea are an English top-flight football club. Clubs sometimes change permanent head coaches during the season and announce new appointments through official club channels. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: This question will resolve based on Chelsea FC’s first official announcement naming its next permanent head coach on the club’s official website or verified social media channels, with a major wire service such as Reuters as backup if needed.
  • Resolution Date: The question resolves on the calendar date when Chelsea publicly announces the appointment, no later than January 31, 2026.
  • Accepted Answer Format: Provide the full name of the appointed coach exactly as given in the official announcement.
### 223607 Which party will say it may reconsider taking part in Bangladesh's February 12, 2026 election because of the fight over who is allowed to run, by January 20, 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-04. Bangladesh is moving toward a national election on 12 February 2026. Political parties are watching closely for signs that election rules are being applied fairly, and some could threaten legal or political action if they believe the process is biased. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: Public statements by party leaders or spokespersons, party press briefings, and corroborating reports from major news organizations.
  • Resolution Date: This question resolves upon the first clear public statement, made no later than January 20, 2026, that a party may reconsider its participation in the February 12, 2026 election because of the dispute over candidate eligibility and foreign citizenship.
  • Accepted Answer Format: The official English name of the party making that statement. If multiple parties clearly qualify, resolve to the party whose qualifying statement is first documented in reliable public reporting.
### 110472 Which team will take Bangladesh's place in the 2026 ICC Men's T20 World Cup by February 7, 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-07. If a qualified side does not participate in a global cricket tournament, the ICC can approve another national team to enter the competition instead. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: The official ICC tournament participant list, fixture pages, or an ICC announcement naming a replacement team.
  • Resolution Date: This question resolves on February 7, 2026.
  • Accepted Answer Format: Provide the official short name of the national team that is confirmed as the replacement participant.
### 180958 Which NFL team will win Super Bowl LX in February 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-19. Super Bowl LX is the National Football League championship game for the 2025 season and is scheduled for early February 2026. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: This question will resolve based on the official NFL final scoreboard, gamebook, or championship recap for Super Bowl LX. If multiple summaries differ, the official NFL gamebook and final score will control.
  • Resolution Date: The resolution occurs when Super Bowl LX is completed and officially declared final in February 2026.
  • Accepted Answer Format: The full official team name of the Super Bowl LX winner must be provided exactly as listed by the NFL.
### 694686 Who will be the starting quarterback of the NFC team that reaches Super Bowl 2026 by January 26, 2026? background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-17. The NFL playoffs are in the conference-championship stage. The quarterback officially starting for the NFC champion will be a key figure in that team’s path to Super Bowl 2026. criteria:
  • Source of Truth: The official NFL gamebook, box score, or game recap for the NFC championship game on NFL.com. Official team publications and major wire-service reports such as AP or Reuters may be used as secondary confirmation.
  • Resolution Date: This question resolves when the NFC championship game is final, expected no later than January 26, 2026.
  • Accepted Answer Format: The full name of the player officially listed as the starting quarterback for the NFC champion in that game.
